# beyondtrust_auth_workload_identity (Resource)

Manages a workload identity (OIDC issuer trust config) in BeyondTrust, enabling workload identity federation against the BeyondTrust auth service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Workload identity for a GitHub Actions pipeline.
resource "beyondtrust_auth_workload_identity" "github_ci" {
  service_name = "my-service"
  issuer_url   = "https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com"
  idp_category = "GitHubActions"
  description  = "CI pipeline for myorg/myrepo"

  registered_scopes = ["admin"]

  conditions = {
    sub              = ["repo:myorg/myrepo:ref:refs/heads/main"]
    repository       = ["myorg/myrepo"]
    repository_owner = ["myorg"]
  }
}

# Workload identity granting access to a non-admin site within the org.
resource "beyondtrust_auth_workload_identity" "aws_broker" {
  service_name = "eks-workload"
  issuer_url   = "https://oidc.eks.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/id/EXAMPLE"
  idp_category = "Custom"
  site_id      = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000" # any site in the organization

  registered_scopes = ["admin"]

  conditions = {
    sub = ["system:serviceaccount:default:my-app"]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `conditions` (Map of List of String) Claim constraints evaluated against the incoming token. Map of claim key to a list of allowed values. Updatable in place.
- `idp_category` (String) Identity provider category. One of: GitHubActions, AzureEntra, Custom. Immutable — changing it forces replacement.
- `issuer_url` (String) OIDC issuer URL (the token 'iss' claim). Immutable — changing it forces replacement.
- `registered_scopes` (List of String) Product scopes granted to this workload identity. At least one is required. Updatable in place.
- `service_name` (String) Human label for this workload identity registration. Immutable — changing it forces replacement.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Free-form description. Updatable in place.
- `scope_level` (String) Scope level for the identity: 'site' or 'org'. Defaults to 'site'. Updatable in place.
- `site_id` (String) The site (UUID) this workload identity grants access to — any site within the organization. Defaults to the provider's configured site when omitted. Immutable — changing it forces replacement.

### Read-Only

- `expected_aud` (String) The expected audience claim for token exchange.
- `id` (String) The stable identity id (UUID) assigned by the auth service.
- `organization_id` (String) The organization (UUID) that owns this workload identity.
